name: java-modernization
description: Enterprise Java modernization for Claude Code: Java 8/11/17 to 21, Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, javax-to-jakarta, dependency alignment, post-migration build/test fixes, and endpoint-by-endpoint re-architecture (trace /search end-to-end, pin behavior with characterization tests, then restructure) — always preserving business logic exactly. Ships a searchable knowledge base and an endpoint slice tracer.
